reasoning_content: Let me check the score details more carefully to see which test cases are not getting 100%.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/score.txt | grep -E \"functional-[0-9]+/[0-9]+\\.sysu\\.c\" | awk '{print $1, $2}' | awk '$2 != \"100.00/100.00\"'", "summary": "Find test cases without perfect score"}

summary: Find test cases without perfect score
